docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT SEAVIEW INSURANCE CO JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEAVIEW INSURANCE CO $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $725.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
